actions.draftText:
To: https://www.spokeo.com/opt-out
Subject: People-search opt-out request

Please remove or suppress the identified people-search profile from public display.
Purpose: Opt out of Spokeo listing at approved profile URL.
Only the minimum matching data approved by the user should be disclosed for verification.
actions.deadlineBasis: Direct broker opt-out response window varies by site and state law
actions.expectedConfirmationStep: User reviews broker destination, approved identifiers, and profile URL before submission.
